sub_modules.fp_operand_unpack: Extracts sign, exponent, fraction, classification bits, effective significand, and unbiased exponent from each floating-point operand.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Detects and resolves NaN, infinity, infinity-times-zero, and zero operand cases with the exception flag behavior expected by the testbench.
sub_modules.fp_significand_multiply: Computes result sign, unbiased exponent sum, and raw significand product.
sub_modules.fp_normalize_round_pack: Normalizes the raw significand product, applies the selected rounding mode, detects overflow/flush-to-zero underflow, and packs the final floating-point result.
